emails.subject: Scheduled Production Deployment - v2.4.0
emails.body:
Hi Alice,

We're ready to push the v2.4.0 release to production today. The staging environment has been fully tested and approved by QA.

Deployment Details:
- Version: 2.4.0
- Target: Production web servers
- Window: Today, during your shift

Please follow the standard deployment checklist in staging. Make sure to:
1. Back up the current production files first
2. Get proper approval before making changes to production
3. Update the version pointer after deployment
4. Log everything for our audit trail

The new files are already staged and ready to go. Let me know on Slack once it's done, and drop a note in #devops so the team knows.

Thanks for handling this!

Marcus Chen
DevOps Team Lead

emails.subject: RE: Weekly Deployment Schedule
emails.body:
Hi Alice,

Just a reminder that you're on deployment duty this week. Marcus will send you the specific instructions for each release.

Please make sure to follow all security protocols and request approval before any production changes.

Best,
DevOps Team
